description: Continuing Education: 3 Credit Hours Available. See training for more details. Vanessa Meade, PsyD, LCSW (she/her), is an assistant professor at the University of Alaska Anchorage's School of Social Work. She is also a U.S. Army/Gulf War Veteran and a former Alaska State Trooper. Dr. Meade is a licensed clinical social worker and psychologist in Alaska. She has also worked as a clinician/therapist in rural community mental health agencies and juvenile justice.
